message:
feat(tests): add 20-test proptest suite for command_transport (ft-3681t.2.3)

Property-based and unit tests covering serde roundtrips for all
command_transport types (CommandKind, InterruptSignal, AckOutcome,
DeliveryStatus, CommandScope, CommandContext), CommandDeduplicator
TTL/eviction invariants, and CommandRouter delivery/skip/dry-run
semantics.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
